differential_diagnoses: Lymphoma (e.g., indolent B-cell or T-cell lymphoma)
next_steps: Perform BRAF V600E mutation testing on the tibial biopsy tissue
Conduct immunohistochemical staining for CD1a, CD68, and S100 to evaluate for histiocytic disorders
Perform a serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Obtain a skeletal survey and formal review of bone marrow findings by a hematopathologist
Initiate systemic treatment with a targeted agent such as vemurafenib if BRAF mutation is identified or interferon-alpha/anakinra if not
Consult with a hematology/oncology specialist with expertise in rare inflammatory or histiocytic disorders
